title: rubus questieri subsp. stenoacanthus
intro: Rubus questieri subsp. stenoacanthus is a subspecies of black raspberry native to the Mediterranean region, known for its dark purple fruits and medicinal properties. This plant is rich in anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for various health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus questieri subsp. stenoacanthus include potential anti-cancer and cardiovascular disease prevention, as well as the management of digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or jams, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
